# Test fixtures — sources & licenses

## `physique-front.jpg`

- **What:** a full-length, front-facing standing figure (Eugen Sandow,
  1867–1925), used by the AC4 real-ONNX test to exercise the bundled MoveNet
  model end-to-end on a genuine human photo.
- **Source:** Wikimedia Commons —
  *"Eugen Sandow, full-length portrait, standing facing front, wearing fig leaf"*
  (Library of Congress, LCCN 91789069).
- **License:** **Public domain** (published before 1929; LoC: no known
  restrictions). No attribution is legally required; recorded here for
  provenance.
